titleStmt.title: SII 9.612: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 612. (A.R. No. 38 of 1917.) ON A STONE SET UP NEAR THE VIRABHADRA TEMPLE AT AMARAPURAM, MADAKSIRA TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1466, Krōdhi, Kārtika, śu. 1[0], Sōmavāra corresponding to A.D. 1544 November 10, Monday, in the reign of Sadāśivadēva-Mahārāya. It records that the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarājaya-Viṭhalēśvaradēva-Mahā-arasu granted exemption from such taxes as teṟe, kāṇike and biṭṭi to the barbers. Koṇḍōja is mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrījayā(bhyu)
bhyudaya śālivāhanaśakavarṣaṁga
ḷu 1466 neya krōdhisaṁvatsarada kā
rttika śu 10 sōmavāradalu śrīma(ṁ)nma
hārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī
vīrapratāpa sadāśivadēvamahārāya
ra nirūpadiṁ śrīma(ṁ)nmahāmaṇḍalēśvara
rāmarājayya viṭalēśvaradēva mahāarasu
gaḷu nāyiṁdarige koṭa śāsana pūrva
dali nimage tere kāṇike biṭi Ēnuṇṭādu Ada
nū nāu nimage biṭṭu nimage sarvamānya
vāgi śāsanava koṭṭeU yi(ṁ)ntī mā(ṁ)nya
ke Ārobbaru tappidare taṁma taṁde
tāyigaḷanu vāraṇāśi tīrthadali
koṁda pāpadali hōharu gōvu
koṁda pāpadali hōharu śunaka
māṁsavanu bhakṣisida
varū koṁḍōjana
māḍida
Digital edition of SII 9.612 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
